hero.headline: Macon Yards That *Actually Get Done*
hero.subheadline: Mowing, trimming, pressure washing, trees — one crew that shows up on time and takes pride in the work.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Beyond Just Mowing
services_section.subheading: A wide array of services to keep your property looking sharp

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Regular mowing, trimming, edging, and blowing. We show up on schedule and do it right.

services.title: Pressure Washing
services.description: Driveways, sidewalks, decks, and siding. Strip away the grime and bring back the clean.

services.title: Tree Services
services.description: Pruning, removal, and maintenance. Professional tree work that keeps your property safe.

services.title: Landscape Design
services.description: Custom designs that work with your space, budget, and lifestyle. Function meets beauty.

about.heading: Pride in Every Job
about.body: We're the Macon landscaping team that shows up when we say we will. One call handles everything from weekly cuts to major tree work.

reviews.name: Peter N.
reviews.text: Solid, dependable service. Always on time with fantastic results and clear pride in their work. Wide range of services beyond basic lawn care.

reviews.name: A. M.
reviews.text: They handle our yard plus pressure washing and tree services. Always professional, polite, and deliver great results.

cta.heading: Ready for a Yard You're Proud Of?
cta.body: Join the schedule that Macon trusts. Free estimates on everything from weekly maintenance to complete landscape design.
